description.zh-Hans: 使用哈希散列生成雨滴效果，支持Time参数驱动动画（0→1循环）。雨滴受重力和风力影响，可平铺。
description.en: Generates rain using hash-distributed particles with Time-driven animation (0→1 loop). Raindrops fall with gravity and wind. Tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 下雨, 雨天, 暴风雨, 雨滴, 天气效果, 降水
triggers.en: rain, raining, stormy, raindrop, weather effect, precipitation

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成下雨动画帧，用于场景天气效果或动态环境背景。
exampleUsage.en: Generate rain animation frames for scene weather effects or dynamic environment backgrounds.
